response.justification: The candidate is an experienced senior engineer but his background is overwhelmingly in web, mobile, and backend development (JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, Node.js), not embedded networking security firmware. The role has hard requirements he does not meet: native-level Japanese is not listed (only English, Romanian fluent, German basic), strong C for UNIX development is minimal (one ~6-month C/C++ stint at National Instruments a decade ago), and there is no evidence of Linux kernel source-code modification, L2/L3 networking, switch products, or security technologies like MACsec/802.1X. The mismatch on core requirements makes him unsuitable for this position.
strengths: Long, varied software career with senior/staff-level experience
Some C/C++ exposure (National Instruments LabWindows/CVI) and embedded-adjacent work
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, Linux familiarity
concerns: No native-level Japanese proficiency, a hard requirement
No security or LAN-switch/networking (L2/L3, 802.1X, MACsec) experience
No demonstrated Linux kernel analysis or source modification; C skills dated and shallow

key_factors.factor: Weak C/UNIX and Linux kernel background
